doctrine: Plan over proof-relevant latent work states, not persuasive futures.

scenarios.label: Research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI research brief is acceptance-ready.

scenarios.label: Software delivery
scenarios.objective: Choose the safest next step for an AI-delivered software milestone.

scenarios.label: Procurement proof room
scenarios.objective: Plan review actions for a vendor claim package before acceptance.

scenarios.label: Safety escalation
scenarios.objective: Choose whether to escalate, quarantine, or continue a sensitive proof package.

candidates.name: Narrative planner
candidates.reason: persuasive future with no validator-backed evidence state

candidates.name: Heuristic router
candidates.reason: auditable fallback, but no lookahead over proof debt

candidates.name: Latent model without gate
candidates.reason: predicts useful next action but lacks validator and replay boundary

candidates.name: ProofZero work planner
candidates.reason: bounded search, validator-aware backup, replay boundary, and evidence reanalyze pass
